summary: Tested soft-delete of admin site notifications (panel + bell). Backend pytest 6/6 PASS. Frontend Playwright E2E PASS for both Bell (site-notif-delete-*) and Panel (site-panel-delete-*). Confirm() auto-accepted, the deleted card / line disappears after refetch. Mark-read regression OK.

covered: POST /delete -> success:true and item removed from subsequent GET
POST /delete idempotent (second call returns success, no crash, still hidden)
POST /restore -> success:true and item reappears in GET
mark-read still works after delete/restore round-trip
delete validates payload (422 on missing id)

frontend_tests.scenario_bell: Login Admin -> click [data-testid='site-notifications-bell'] -> dropdown opens with 2 items each carrying [data-testid^='site-notif-delete-'] trash button -> click first -> confirm() -> notification line disappears after refetch. stopPropagation works (markOne pas declenche).
frontend_tests.scenario_panel: Onglet 'Notifs Site' visible dans le header Admin -> SiteNotificationsPanel charge -> cartes affichent bouton corbeille rouge [data-testid^='site-panel-delete-'] en bas a droite -> clic -> confirm() -> la carte disparait apres refetch.
frontend_tests.regression: Bouton 'Marquer lu' present sur les cartes non lues. Bouton 'Tout marquer comme lu' visible dans le header du panneau quand unread>0. Conditionne par unread>0 = comportement attendu.

critical_code_review_comments: admin_site_notifications.py uses a module-level AsyncIOMotorClient created at import time without ServerSelectionTimeoutMS - acceptable in this codebase pattern but consider DI for testability.
Frontend deleteOne in SiteNotificationsBell.jsx correctly uses stopPropagation on the trash button to avoid triggering parent markOne handler. Good.

Both deleteOne implementations rely on window.confirm() which blocks the page - acceptable for an admin tool but no undo UI is surfaced even though /restore exists. Consider exposing 'Annuler' in the success toast (toast.success with action) for better UX.
_filter_deleted runs per type (6 sequential round-trips) instead of one bulk query - micro-optimization possible but currently fast enough.
test_credentials: Admin / Nikeland2026 sur /caisse (login via bouton Admin)
seed_data_creation: Tests reutilisent les bookings existants si la creation echoue (fallback). En live le panneau contenait 1-2 delivery_orders qui ont servi de cibles.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Soft-delete des notifs Admin OK (endpoint /delete + /restore + filtre _filter_deleted). UI : bouton corbeille rose dans cloche (data-testid='site-notif-delete-{type}-{id}') et dans panneau (data-testid='site-panel-delete-{type}-{id}'). Onglet pour le panneau s'appelle 'Notifs Site' dans le header Admin de /caisse.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - feature addition validee, pas de bug.
